commits.subject: Day 112 (17:27): Harden bash tool with pipefail and bounded command prefix (Task 1)

eval.reason: The diff correctly prepends `set -o pipefail;` to every bash command at the spawn site (after RTK prefixing, before Command::new), adds no `set -e`, touches no other functions, and includes a well-targeted test that verifies pipe-fail exit-code propagation. Build and full test suite both pass.
